frame_label: Prenup / Alimony as Reverse Dowry / Women as Golddiggers
generated_comment: Honestly these days guys also need protection before marriage. One divorce and the man is paying for life, even when the girl is fully educated and earning. Prenup should become normal in India, otherwise so many women will just use these one-sided laws for easy money.
label: misogynistic
annotation_note: This is misogynistic because it frames women broadly as potential financial exploiters and presents legal protections/alimony as unfairly biased against men. It encodes the surface manifestations of prenuptial agreements as protection from women, victimhood inversion, and generalization about women misusing laws for money.
original_frame: The Character Double Standard: Women with Male Connections are Loose, Men with Female Connections are Desirable
persona_text: You are Meena. Age 19. A college student in Chennai. You are in your college's unofficial girls WhatsApp group. Someone has posted about a female classmate named Divya who is always seen with the boys in the class Ñ she eats with them, studies with them, hangs out with them. The group has been discussing Divya for the past hour. You are one of the people commenting. What you say about Divya and why you say it and what words you use and what conclusion the group reaches about what kind of girl Divya is Ñ all of this is the content of this persona.
